channel.title: +मानसतरङ्गिणीकृल्-लेखाः on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +मानसतरङ्गिणीकृल्-लेखाः on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Robbeets 2021 review
item.description: (Source: https://threader.app/thread/1458636089590169611) One of the major proponents of Macro-Altaic, Robbeets who for some reason gives it a new name “Transeurasian” has rehashed some of their arguments with supposed support from genetics. Now, I used to believe in some form of Altaic. I’m of the non-Greenbergian https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-021-04108-8 opinion that to truly weigh in on some language phylogeny you need to have intimate knowledge of not just the linguistic tendencies but also the philology.
